name: openviking-opencode
author: volcengine
description: OpenCode plugin for OpenViking — exposes native tools for memory, search, and code retrieval

scripts.check: node --check index.mjs && node --check lib/runtime.mjs && node --check lib/repo-context.mjs && node --check lib/memory-session.mjs && node --check lib/memadd-local.mjs && node --check lib/memory-tools.mjs && node --check lib/code-tools.mjs && node --check lib/memory-recall.mjs && node --check lib/utils.mjs
